mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_check_task (status, similar_pair_count, active_spec_count, started_at) VALUES (#{status}, #{similarPairCount}, #{activeSpecCount}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, status, similar_pair_count, active_spec_count, started_at, completed_at, error_message FROM health_check_task WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, status, similar_pair_count, active_spec_count, started_at, completed_at, error_message FROM health_check_task WHERE status = 'running' LIMIT 1
